zh.lifeSummary: 當Parnelle Warmwell於1269年出生在英國多瑟特時，她的父親Geoffrey Warmwell24歲，母親Ann Mohun24歲。她於1290年與Richard Bingham在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年在英國享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Parnelle Warmwell于1269年出生在英国多瑟特时，她的父亲Geoffrey Warmwell24岁，母亲Ann Mohun24岁。她于1290年与Richard Bingham在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年在英国享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warmwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Wardle or a habitational name from a place called Wordwell in Suffolk, probably named with an Old English wride ‘bend’ + well ‘stream’.

variants.name: Wardle
meanings: habitational name from Wardle in Lancashire and possibly Wardle in Cheshire, both named with Old English weard-hyll ‘watch hill’. Compare Warden 2 and Wardlaw .
habitational name from Weardale (Durham), which takes its name from the river Wear (related to the Indo-European root wis-, weis- ‘liquid, flow’ or wedōr- ‘water’) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Parnelle
meanings: A female name corrupted from Petronilla.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Parnelle Warmwell was born in 1269, in Dorset, England, her father, Geoffrey Warmwell, was 24 and her mother, Ann Mohun, was 24. She married Richard Bingham in 1290, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1317, in England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Parnelle Warmwell est née en 1269, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Warmwell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ann Mohun, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Bingham en 1290, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1317, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Parnelle Warmwell(이)가 1269년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Warmwell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Mohun(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Richard Bingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 영국에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Parnelle Warmwell родилась в 1269 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Warmwell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Mohun, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Bingham в 1290 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1317 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
